heading: Definitions
label: 2104 Definitions

children.heading: Agreed accounting standards
children.label: 1 Agreed accounting standards
children.text: The term “agreed accounting standards” means modified accrual accounting standards or, for any period during which the Oversight Board determines in its sole discretion that a territorial government is not reasonably capable of comprehensive reporting that complies with modified accrual accounting standards, such other accounting standards as proposed by the Oversight Board.

children.heading: Bond
children.label: 2 Bond
children.text: The term “Bond” means a bond, loan, letter of credit, other borrowing title, obligation of insurance, or other financial indebtedness for borrowed money, including rights, entitlements, or obligations whether such rights, entitlements, or obligations arise from contract, statute, or any other source of law, in any case, related to such a bond, loan, letter of credit, other borrowing title, obligation of insurance, or other financial indebtedness in physical or dematerialized form of which the issuer, obligor, or guarantor is the territorial government.

children.label: A
children.text: right to payment, whether or not such right is reduced to judgment, liquidated, unliquidated, fixed, contingent, matured, unmatured, disputed, undisputed, legal, equitable, secured, or unsecured; or

children.label: B
children.text: right to an equitable remedy for breach of performance if such breach gives rise to a right to payment, whether or not such right to an equitable remedy is reduced to judgment, fixed, contingent, matured, unmatured, disputed, undisputed, secured, or unsecured.

children.heading: Budget
children.label: 4 Budget
children.text: The term “Budget” means the Territory Budget or an Instrumentality Budget, as applicable.

children.heading: Puerto Rico
children.label: 5 Puerto Rico
children.text: The term “Puerto Rico” means the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.

children.label: A
children.text: agreed accounting standards; and

children.label: B
children.text: the applicable Fiscal Plan.

children.heading: Covered territorial instrumentality
children.label: 7 Covered territorial instrumentality
children.text: The term “covered territorial instrumentality” means a territorial instrumentality designated by the Oversight Board pursuant to to be subject to the requirements of this chapter.section 2121 of this title

children.heading: Covered territory
children.label: 8 Covered territory
children.text: The term “covered territory” means a territory for which an Oversight Board has been established under .section 2121 of this title

children.heading: Executive Director
children.label: 9 Executive Director
children.text: The term “Executive Director” means an Executive Director appointed under .section 2123(a) of this title

children.heading: Fiscal Plan
children.label: 10 Fiscal Plan
children.text: The term “Fiscal Plan” means a Territory Fiscal Plan or an Instrumentality Fiscal Plan, as applicable.

children.heading: Government of Puerto Rico
children.label: 11 Government of Puerto Rico
children.text: The term “Government of Puerto Rico” means the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, including all its territorial instrumentalities.

children.heading: Governor
children.label: 12 Governor
children.text: The term “Governor” means the chief executive of a covered territory.

children.heading: Instrumentality Budget
children.label: 13 Instrumentality Budget
children.text: The term “Instrumentality Budget” means a budget for a covered territorial instrumentality, designated by the Oversight Board in accordance with , submitted, approved, and certified in accordance with .section 2121 of this titlesection 2142 of this title

children.heading: Instrumentality Fiscal Plan
children.label: 14 Instrumentality Fiscal Plan
children.text: The term “Instrumentality Fiscal Plan” means a fiscal plan for a covered territorial instrumentality, designated by the Oversight Board in accordance with , submitted, approved, and certified in accordance with .section 2121 of this titlesection 2141 of this title

children.heading: Legislature
children.label: 15 Legislature
children.text: The term “Legislature” means the legislative body responsible for enacting the laws of a covered territory.

children.heading: Modified accrual accounting standards
children.label: 16 Modified accrual accounting standards
children.text: The term “modified accrual accounting standards” means recognizing revenues as they become available and measurable and recognizing expenditures when liabilities are incurred, in each case as defined by the Governmental Accounting Standards Board, in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles.

children.heading: Oversight Board
children.label: 17 Oversight Board
children.text: The term “Oversight Board” means a Financial Oversight and Management Board established in accordance with .section 2121 of this title

children.heading: Territorial government
children.label: 18 Territorial government
children.text: The term “territorial government” means the government of a covered territory, including all covered territorial instrumentalities.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “territorial instrumentality” means any political subdivision, public agency, instrumentality—including any instrumentality that is also a bank—or public corporation of a territory, and this term should be broadly construed to effectuate the purposes of this chapter.

children.heading: Exclusion
children.label: B Exclusion
children.text: The term “territorial instrumentality” does not include an Oversight Board.

children.label: A
children.text: Puerto Rico;

children.label: B
children.text: Guam;

children.label: C
children.text: American Samoa;

children.label: D
children.text: the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands; or

children.label: E
children.text: the United States Virgin Islands.

children.heading: Territory Budget
children.label: 21 Territory Budget
children.text: The term “Territory Budget” means a budget for a territorial government submitted, approved, and certified in accordance with .section 2142 of this title

children.heading: Territory Fiscal Plan
children.label: 22 Territory Fiscal Plan
children.text: The term “Territory Fiscal Plan” means a fiscal plan for a territorial government submitted, approved, and certified in accordance with .section 2141 of this title
